_comment: Auto-generated by github.com/dannotes/onair release workflow. Do not edit by hand.
description: Watch Microsoft Teams and turn a Philips WiZ smart bulb red while you're on a call
notes: Run 'onair' to launch the dashboard. It will open in your browser automatically the first time.
Configure your bulb there, then toggle 'Run on Login' in Settings -> Advanced if you want it to start on every login.
